scripts.dev: npm run docker:up && concurrently -n gateway,auth,chat,agent -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:chat" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,auth,chat,agent -c blue,green,yellow,magenta --kill-others=false "node gateway/index.js" "node services/auth/index.js" "node services/chat/index.js" "node services/agent/index.js"
